description: Representative prompt bank for compression evaluation. 15 prompts across 3 categories.

explanation.description: Prompts requiring technical explanation with preserved accuracy

prompts.text: Explain how the convergence engine detects score plateaus and triggers safety gate restarts.
Explain the PREEMPT decay mechanism: the Ebbinghaus half-life per item type, the tier thresholds, and what triggers demotion.
Explain how the recovery engine selects strategies and manages the budget ceiling.
Explain the difference between output compression and caveman mode in the forge pipeline.
Explain how the check engine L0 layer validates edits before they are applied.
Reviewed 5 Kotlin files in a Spring Boot service. Found: missing @Transactional on use case, N+1 query in repository, hardcoded secret in config.
Reviewed React component tree. Found: missing Error Boundary at route level, inline styles instead of design tokens, no key prop on list items.
Security review of authentication middleware. Found: JWT tokens not validated for expiry, CORS allows wildcard origin, no rate limiting.
Architecture review of hexagonal port-adapter structure. Found: adapter directly imports domain entity, missing port interface for notification service.
Performance review of data pipeline. Found: unbounded in-memory collection, synchronous I/O in hot path, missing index on frequently queried column.

code-gen.description: Prompts requiring code generation with preserved code blocks

prompts.text: Generate a Kotlin data class for a User entity with validation annotations and a companion factory method.
Generate a TypeScript Vitest test suite for a UserService that tests create, read, update, delete operations.
Generate a Python FastAPI endpoint for user registration with email validation and password hashing.
Generate a Go test for a cache service that tests set, get, expiry, and eviction behavior.
Generate a Rust implementation of a retry strategy with exponential backoff and maximum attempts.
